cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem. So, Jennifer went to the swimming pool today, and we need to determine between which times she could have gone. Next, Samantha saw her reading at the library from 12pm to 1pm. So between 12pm and 1pm, she was at the library. So the pool visit couldn't be during that time. Then, Betty saw Jennifer buying a bike at the bike shop from 1pm to 2pm. So from 1pm to 2pm, she was at the bike shop. So that's another time she was occupied. After that, Sarah saw her buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 9pm. So she was at the electronics store from 2pm to 9pm. That's a long time. The swimming pool closes after 10pm, so she couldn't have gone to the pool after 10pm. But she was walking towards the Statue of Liberty during 9 to 10pm, so that's another time she was occupied.
